data.name: EncodingAlias.Help
data.value: UVG launchs a http request when encode a video, this option indicates the alias used by UVG encoding engine. Make sure the following url works fine with this alias.

data.name: LowQualityVersion.Help
data.value: The video format of the low quality version, H264 baseline profile is recommended.

data.name: LowQualitySize.Help
data.value: The maximum vertical resolution of videos, videos bigger than this will be resized.

data.name: HighQualityVersion.Help
data.value: The video format of the high quality version, H264 main profile is recommended.

data.name: HighQualitySize.Help
data.value: The maximum vertical resolution of videos, videos bigger than this will be resized.

data.name: ScreenshotResolution.Help
data.value: UVG captures a screenshot for each uploaded video, limit size to.

data.name: ReencodeMp4.Help
data.value: Whether to re-encode mp4 files when upload, check this option if your mp4 are not encoded in H.264 format

data.name: FMSUrl.Help
data.value: If you have a FMS you can enter its URL here, which allows you to record videos from webcam

data.name: VideoQuality.Help
data.value: The video quality of recorded videos

data.name: VideoSize.Help
data.value: The camera size of video recording

data.name: ScreenshotFrames.Help
data.value: UVG is able to capture a multi-frame Gif screenshot for each video uploaded, this option dicates the number frames, choose 1 for traditional static screenshot

data.name: AmazonS3.Help
data.value: UVG is able to transfer videos from this server to Amazon S3 for fast and security storage

data.name: VideoViewPermission.Help
data.value: Enable view permission on individual videos

data.name: LoginToRate.Help
data.value: Require users to login before like/dislike a video

data.name: VideoToWide.Text
data.value: To encode in Baseline mode the video size should not exceed 640x480

data.name: BaselineForLowOnly.Text
data.value: The baseline profile can only be used for low quality version

data.name: NeedApproval.Help
data.value: Videos posted by normal users need to be approved

data.name: NotifyModerators.Help
data.value: Notify moderators when there is a video pending for approval

data.name: UploadQuota.Help
data.value: The maximum no. of videos an user can upload, this limitation does not apply to video managers

data.name: NewTags.Help
data.value: Check this option if you wish to limit normal users from choosing existing tags only.

data.name: Issues.Text
data.value: Following issues are found, make necessary changes if they become a problem.

data.name: DNNJournalIntegration.Help
data.value: When work on DNN 6.2+, post video/comment add/delete event to DNN Journal.

data.name: DNN62Required.Text
data.value: The journal integration feature only works on DNN 6.2+

data.name: NoBinaryPack.Text
data.value: UVG 6 Binary pack is required by UVG to do video encoding, but not part of UVG PA because of its file size, please download it, unzip it and copy to /DesktopModules/UltraVideoGallery/Binaries folder by your self.

data.name: PermissionCheckNotPassed.Text
data.value: You did not run or failed UVG permission check so you are limited to upload videos in .flv and .mp4 formats only.

data.name: MimeTypeNotEnabled.Text
data.value: If videos do not play, the most common reason is .flv/.mp4 mime types are not supported by your IIS. If the mime types are properly configured you can simply ignore it.

data.name: RequestLengthTooSmall.Text
data.value: The maxRequestLength setting in your web.config is set to [VALUE], increase it if you wish to upload videos larger than this.

data.name: ExecutionTimeoutTooSmall.Text
data.value: The executionTimeout setting in your web.config is set to [VALUE] seconds, which might not be enough for UVG to encode long videos.

data.name: NotAllFormatsAllowed.Text
data.value: UVG supports all popular video formats, but currently not all of them are enabled in your host settings.

data.name: NoUVGPages.Text
data.value: UVG need at least 3 extra DNN pages to upload, browse and play videos, it seems some of them does not exist.

data.name: NoNeatUpload.Text
data.value: NeatUpload, the 3rd party component used to offer upload progress bar, is not installed in your web.config.

data.name: UpdateMRL.Text
data.value: maxRequestLength in your web.config will be chanaged to 204800, are you sure you wish to continue?

data.name: UpdateTimeout.Text
data.value: executionTimeout in your web.config will be changed to 1800, are you sure you wish to continue?

data.name: AddFormats.Text
data.value: The extensions of supported video formats will be added to Host Settings -> Other Settings -> Allowed File Extensions, are you sure you wish to continue?

data.name: EnableMime.Text
data.value:
We strongly recommend you to add .flv/.mp4 mime type support in your IIS, use this feature only when you are not able to do that.

A new staticContent node will be added to your web.config for .flv/.mp4 mime type support. Delete this node from your web.config if any problem arise.

You can leave this message along as long as the mime types are properly configured.

Are you sure you wish to continue?

data.name: SetupPages.Text
data.value: 3 DNN pages will be created with 3 different UVG modules AFTER current page, are you sure you wish to continue?

data.name: InstallNeatUpload.Text
data.value: Neatupload will be injected to your web.config, you should restore it from web.config.uvg when uninstall UVG, are you sure you wish to continue?

data.name: ConfirmReactivation.Text
data.value: UVG is already activated, are you sure you wish to reactivate it?

data.name: Theme.Help
data.value: This parameter indicates whether the embedded player will display player controls (like a 'play' button or volume control) within a dark or light control bar.

data.name: ShowControls.Help
data.value: This parameter indicates whether the video player controls will display.

data.name: Color.Help
data.value: This parameter specifies the color that will be used in the player's video progress bar to highlight the amount of the video that the viewer has already seen.

data.name: Loop.Help
data.value: Play the initial video again and again.

data.name: Modestbranding.Help
data.value: This parameter lets you use a YouTube player that does not show a YouTube logo.

data.name: UpdateExisting.Help
data.value: Above settings applys to new-added videos only, click this button to update existing videos.

data.name: UpdateYTVideos.Help
data.value: Are you sure you wish to update all Youtube videos within this portal?

data.name: NeedUVG4BinaryPack.Text
data.value: To use H264 baseline encoding you must install UVG 6 binary pack, which can be found on bizmodules.net "Downloads" page.

data.name: AmazonConfig.Text
data.value: The video encoding parameters in this module applies to our own video encoding engine, use UVG_AmazonConfig module(under UVG_Setup definition) to configure it if you wish to encode videos by Amazon Elastic Transcoder.

data.name: FrameRate.Help
data.value: Frames per second, leave it blank to keep the original frame rate of videos
